text: 9 - 30 9.2.2 Emergency Stop Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set excluding valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor 1 set assembly excluding body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one test valve 1 set servomotor assembly excluding body 9.2.3 HP Control Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set except valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor assembly 1 set except servomotor body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one pilot valve 1 set of each assembly except body) type and size iv) Set of mounting arrangement for position transmitter for one 1 set HP control valve (complete set comprising of bellows, pins, bushes, couplers, lock washers, position detector) 9.2.4 IP Stop Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set excluding valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor 1 set assembly excluding body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one test valve 1 set assembly except valve body 9.2.5 IP Control Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set except valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servo motor assembly 1set except body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one pilot valve assembly 1set except body Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 31 iv) Set of mounting arrangement for position transmitter for one 1 set IP control valve (Complete set comprising of bellows, bushes, couplers, pins, lock washers, position detector) 9.2.6 Drain Valves with Actuators 10% of each type and size 9.2.7 Gland Steam System i) Turbine gland steam supply valves (c omplete set of internals 1set required to form one valve assembly except outer body) ii) Turbine gland steam leak-off valves (complete set of internals 1 set required to form one valve assembly except for outer body) iii) Valves for gland steam seal system 1 no. of each type and size 9.2.8 Turning Gear i) Gear internal with shafts, bearing, bushes, lock washers, 1 set oil seals, ‘O’ rings ii) 25% nozzle segments and moving blades and complete 1 set set of sealing strips with caulking material (if
